— Manifesto —

The first insole engineered to think no electronics, no motors just shape.

The Product

Geometry is
the intelligence

Every hexagonal cell, every lattice beam precision-engineered to redirect pressure — not through software, not through sensors, but through the shape itself.

3D-printed in EPU. Personalized per foot. Zero moving parts. Zero maintenance.

Material
EPU
Manufacturing
3D-printable
Electronics
None required
Personalization
Geometry-encoded
01 — The Technology

Flexure units that
think in geometry

Our compliant mechanisms redistribute pressure through shape, not motors. No electronics. No actuators. No failure modes.

Structures that deform intelligently under load — validated across three generations of prototypes.

02 — The Platform

From insoles
to humanoid joints

The insole is the entry point. The underlying platform applies anywhere a machine interfaces with the human body.

Prosthetics. Exoskeletons. Humanoid robotics. The same intelligence, scaled.

03 — The Vision

Mechanical intelligence
at every scale

The same compliant mechanism technology that shapes your insole can flex a prosthetic socket, absorb shock in an exoskeleton joint, or give a humanoid robot a natural footfall.

One geometry library. Infinite applications.

Zero Electronics
Applications

One platform,
infinite
surfaces

From the sole of a shoe to the joint of a humanoid — compliant mechanisms engineered for every biological load path.

01

Therapeutic Footwear

Shape-morphing insoles for diabetic foot, plantar fasciitis, and post-surgical rehabilitation. Real-time pressure redistribution without electronics.

Entry Market · Active
02

Prosthetic Sockets

Adaptive socket liners that redistribute interface pressure for above- and below-knee amputees, improving comfort and reducing skin breakdown.

Development
03

Exoskeleton Joints

Compliant joint elements for lower-limb exoskeletons that absorb shock and adapt to gait variation without active control.

Research
04

Humanoid Robotics

Passive compliant feet and manipulator fingers for humanoid robots — reducing actuation demands and improving contact stability.

Vision

Shape the future
of human motion.

The technology is built. The clinical validation is underway. We are looking for partners, investors, and visionaries who see what we see.

Compliant machines
for humans & robots.

Deep tech startup engineering shape-morphing compliant mechanisms — the foundational layer of mechanical intelligence.
